TextENGNew: "So — I hope you all enjoyed the Batsukoishi-hen bonus story."
changeReason: Old says 'bonus story', new says 'Batsukoishi-hen bonus story'; new preserves the Japanese arc name which is significant for identifying the specific arc.

TextENGNew: "It turned out to be a bit of a risqué scenario... I wonder if that was all right?"
"Even so, I can't help feeling like Kei-chan got all the good scenes in this one!"
"Ha ha ha ha! It ended badly for me as always, but personally, I didn't mind it one bit! Punishment games are the best~~!"
"I-I do wish you would consider things from our position, being dragged around by a man's unwholesome desires!"
"W-Well... even if it was all in his imagination... there were just a few too many risqué punishment games, weren't there, weren't there..."
"Too many? I'm fairly certain all of them were lewd."
"Half-stripping a gym uniform with a school swimsuit underneath is simply too blatant!"
changeReason: Old says 'too suggestive', new says 'too blatant'; JPN 露骨 means 'blatant/explicit', a slightly different nuance.

TextENGNew: "...Satoko and I were both reduced to objects of amusement."
changeReason: Old says 'played with like toys', new says 'reduced to objects of amusement'; JPN 慰みもの means 'plaything/object of amusement', slightly different connotation.

TextENGNew: "The indignity was simply unforgivable!!"
changeReason: Different exclamations: old 'It was disgraceful!!' vs new 'The indignity was simply unforgivable!!'; JPN みっともないったらありませんわ expresses extreme shame/disgrace.

TextENGNew: "I... with my mouth... spoon... yogurt... *th-thump* ...hau~..."
"Ugh! You all had it easy with short punishment games! I would have had to spend a whole day in a school swimsuit?! That was clearly unfair to me alone!"
"C-Come on, don't take it out on me...! I was just following the script too!"
"But honestly, those were situations I'd love to see play out in the main story too!! Wahahahaha!"
"Keiichi-kun does suffer through so much in the main story... Maybe letting him enjoy himself in a fantasy event once in a while is fine, fine..."
"...He can only find happiness in his fantasies. How sad, how pitiable."
"Even his fantasies were a tremendous nuisance to us!! I'm absolutely furious!"
"Hmm. So the only way to settle a grudge born in fantasy is to take revenge within a fantasy."
changeReason: Old says 'we need to use our fantasies to take revenge for his' vs new says 'the only way to settle a grudge born in fantasy is to take revenge within a fantasy'; the new version more accurately conveys the logic of the JPN.

TextENGNew: "Wahahahaha! That's fair! I don't mind at all what happens in your imaginations. Give fantasy-me whatever punishment game you like! The real me won't feel a thing~!"
"Shion-san... taking revenge only within our imagination doesn't feel particularly satisfying, does it."
"Satoko~, no, no, that's not what this is."
"This is a strategy meeting for what we'll make Kei-chan do the next time he loses!"
"Ahahahaha, I see. You mean we should do exactly what Keiichi-kun and the others were doing in this story!"
"When you put it that way, it does sound rather entertaining!"
"If we think up a splendid punishment game, the pleasure of thrashing Keiichi-san will be all the greater."
changeReason: Old says 'fabulous game' and 'fun to beat', new says 'splendid punishment game' and 'pleasure of thrashing'; different intensity level.

TextENGNew: "Exactly. Our fantasies are fuel for tomorrow's battles. For now, let's give this a try."
"...Go for it — yay."
"What he made me do was spend the whole day in a school swimsuit. What would be a fitting equivalent?"
"As they say — an eye for an eye, a tooth for a tooth..."
"...So should we have Keiichi-kun spend a whole day in a school swimsuit too? A whole day...?"
changeReason: Old says '...Then should we have Keiichi-kun... spend the day in a school swimsuit too...?' which doesn't match the JPN which is a straightforward suggestion, not hesitant. The new correctly renders it as a proposal.

TextENGNew: "Ho-ho-ho-ho!! I can just picture the miserable look on Keiichi-san's face!!"
"Spending a whole day bright red, half-crouched, eyes downcast, desperately trying to endure..."
"Ku ku ku, that's not a bad start."
"...Keiichi-kun all red and flustered... together in a swimsuit all day..."
"...So kyuuute... hau~~!!! I'm taking him home with me~~!!"
"...Personally, I still think a maid outfit would be the better choice."
"Oh come on, Rika-chan! A school swimsuit is far more cruel — it leaves nothing to hide the body lines!"
"His noble, boyish particulars would be on full display~~!!"
changeReason: Old says 'lordly, boyish circumstances' vs new says 'noble, boyish particulars'; JPN やんごとなき事情 is a humorous euphemism. Both are acceptable renderings but convey slightly different nuances.

TextENGNew: "Noble particulars trembling and swaying... pwahhh... hau~~~☆"
"I agree with Mion-san. A maid outfit is a bit run-of-the-mill these days, isn't it?"
"...We make him wear the maid outfit, and then have him play in the supervisor's match."
"A Hinamizawa Fighters game?!"
"...Well, that could... Rika-chama. That's either diabolical or simply cruel — I can't decide which."
changeReason: Old says 'That could... Rika-chama, you're good. I can't tell whether it's more gross or more cruel' vs new says 'Well, that could... Rika-chama. That's either diabolical or simply cruel'; different word choices (gross vs diabolical) convey different evaluations.

TextENGNew: ``M-Making him play in Coach's match in a maid outfit would be like tying a lamb by the legs and dropping it into a shark tank...!!``
changeReason: Old mistranslates 羊 as 'goat' (should be sheep/lamb) and renders 監督の試合 as 'a game for Coach' instead of 'the supervisor's match' — two inaccuracies in one line.

TextENGNew: "I'm a little curious what kind of reaction the supervisor would have!"
"All right, let's simulate it!! Fantasy mode — switching on!!"
"'M... Maebara-san...!!!! Just what on earth are you wearing?!!?'"
"'Uh, you see!! This, well, it's... a punishment game from club activities... I-I-I'm so sorry, I absolutely did not wear this to disrespect baseball!'"
"'Showing up in an outfit like that — how disrespectful. It's an insult to the game of baseball!'"
"'No, I truly didn't mean it that way...'"
"'We're not happy about this, Hinamizawa Fighters! Let's just call today's game off!'"
As Keiichi shrank back, Coach stepped between them, jaw set, expression resolute.
changeReason: Old says 'Coach, with a resolute expression, cut between him and the others' vs new says 'the supervisor stepped between them, jaw set, expression resolute'. 'Coach' vs 'supervisor' is a meaningful difference in how 監督 is translated throughout.

TextENGNew: "'...Everyone, please settle down!'"

"'Nowhere in the code of baseball sportsmanship is it written that one must wear a uniform in order to play. It is said that when Japanese baseball persevered through the devastation of war, some players took the field in their military uniforms because proper team uniforms could not be obtained. What matters is the spirit!'"

"'Maids. Maids, I say. That maid culture, alongside the Nile, the Indus, and the Euphrates, is counted among the four great civilizations — even elementary school children know this as common knowledge today.'"

"'Indeed, baseball culture itself traces its roots to 18th-century England. In that sense, this maid's uniform — born of a culture that shares its homeland with baseball — could be said to be a far more ancient and proper form of baseball attire than the uniforms we wear today!!!'"
""Yeaaaaahhhhhhh!!! Coach! Coach!! Coach!!!""
changeReason: Consistent change: old uses 'Coach' throughout, new uses 'Supervisor' for 監督. This is a significant naming/role change.

TextENGNew: ""Who cares what anyone's wearing!! Just start the game already!!""
Crack — roaaaar.
Swoosh — roaaaar roaaaar!
"'This is your moment, Maebara-san. As you know, the rivalry between our Hinamizawa Fighters and the Okinomiya Titans runs long and deep.'"
"'If you fail to deliver at this at-bat, you will not be getting off easily.'"
"'...U-Understood... I'll do my best... but I can't promise I'll get a hit...'"
"'Lamentable. An absolute prohibition for a maid sworn to serve her master — those very words you just spoke. Now, if you come up short at this at-bat...'"
"'...What... what will happen...?'"
"'I would have to punish you.'"
"'...Appearing in proper maid attire and still losing is, in essence, an insult to both baseball and maid culture simultaneously.'"
"'In that case, I would naturally punish you in the English manner.'"
"...The English manner of punishment?!"
"Trembling, Kei-chan asks. The supervisor smiles coldly, like a reptile — and then, stroking Kei-chan's waist, leans down to whisper in his ear."
"Wh-What could the English punishment be, what could it be... hauuu~~..."
"Kei-chan steps up to the batter's box, grips the bat — and goes rigid."
"Oh no?! The bat has been tampered with — there's no way he'll be able to hit with it!"
"Yes — he has fallen perfectly into Coach's trap. At this rate, Kei-chan's purity is about to be claimed by Coach...!!"
changeReason: Old says 'Coach would have his way with Kei-chan's chastity' vs new says 'Kei-chan's purity is about to be claimed by the supervisor'. Both convey the same joke but 'Coach' vs 'supervisor' is the key difference.

TextENGNew: "Hey hey, wait a second, Shionnnn!!! I sat quietly and listened, but things have taken a completely unacceptable turn!"
"Oh, come on, Kei-chan, don't interrupt! This is all in a fantasy, you know? None of this has anything to do with the real you!"
"That's right!! This is simply girls getting together to share some creative daydreams. Is this not exactly the same as what you and the boys were doing?"
"W-Well... I suppose, but... even as just daydreams, there are still things I can't simply unhear."
"...If you'd like to listen, there's a perfectly good chair for you to sit in. ...Nipah~☆"
"I want to talk about other punishment games too! Oh right, Keiichi-san, weren't you the one saying something about bunny girl outfits?"
"And there was something about wiping windows in swimsuits, too, wasn't there...? Kei-chan, you came up with some pretty remarkable ideas yourself, didn't you?"
"It wasn't me!! And you're mixing them up! Besides, those were Tomitake-san's and Oishi-san's ideas!! Well, I admit I got a little carried away..."
"Hau~!! It doesn't matter who thought of it! Keiichi-kun in a bunny suit would be so kyuuute...☆"
"Then let's take a look. Fantasy mode — switching on!!"

"'...Damn...! This outfit was already embarrassing enough as it is!! And now... wiping the window with my bottom?! Damn... if I let go of my chest the whole thing flips up and there's nothing more mortifying than that... Gah, I'm so miserable I could cry. ...Heave-ho, heave-ho... *squeak* *squeak*'"
Snap snap snap!!!
Snap snap snap snap snap snap!!!
"'Owahhhhh!! Wh-What are those flashes?! Rapid-fire photography — hundreds of frames a second!!'"
"'T-Tomitake-san?! I thought you were a wildlife photographer!! Since when did you switch to bunnies?!!'"
changeReason: Old says 'Gyahhhh, please, stop! You're taking pictures of me like this?!? I thought you were a wild bird photographer!!' — new omits the 'Gyahhhh, please, stop! You're taking pictures of me like this?!?' part that was in the old but replaces with a shorter version. The JPN only has the photographer question, so the old had additions not in the source.

TextENGNew: "'K-Keiichi-kun, please don't misunderstand.'"
"'I genuinely consider myself a wildlife specialist, you know? This very moment included, of course!'"
*snap* *snap* *snap*!!!
"'Would you kindly explain what species of bird you're currently photographing?!! What precisely are you zooming in on with that telephoto lens?!!'"

"'Keiichi-kun, have you ever heard of the term 'mountain whale'? Of course there are no whales living in the mountains. But people in the Edo period spoke of whales swimming through the mountains, and treated their meat as a delicacy.'"

"'Ha ha ha. They say what was actually meant was wild boar. In those days, eating the flesh of four-legged animals was forbidden for religious reasons. But if it was a whale, it was fish — meaning, technically, there was no problem with eating it.'"
changeReason: Old says 'They were forbidden for religious reasons from eating animal meat' vs new says 'eating the flesh of four-legged animals was forbidden for religious reasons'. The JPN とある理由で獣肉を食べることが禁じられていた says 'for a certain reason, eating animal/beast meat was forbidden'. New is slightly more specific with 'four-legged'.

TextENGNew: *snap* *snap* *snap*!!
"'Now now, stop covering yourself with your hands! Wipe the window with your bottom! Wipe!'"
"'I... I think I can see where this is heading, but could you please stop the snapping for now?!!'"
"'That's right — a bunny is a rabbit.'"
"'And rabbits, too, were classified as a kind of bird in the Edo period. The same logic as the mountain whale — they declared that rabbit meat was technically bird meat, so it was permitted to eat.'"
"'Therefore — bunnies are, in fact, a subspecies of bird!'"
changeReason: Old says 'bunnies are relatives of birds' vs new says 'bunnies are, in fact, a subspecies of bird'; different biological classification claim (relatives vs subspecies).

TextENGNew: "'So even if I capture you through my viewfinder, there is absolutely no issue with that whatsoever!! Oh look, you missed a spot!'"
*snap* *snap*!!!

"'Even I know that rabbit stew was wildly popular among Edo commoners... but that culture has absolutely nothing to do with you photographing me in this embarrassing state!!!! Besides, shouldn't rabbit stew fall under the purview of chefs?! You're a photographer, Tomitake-san — you're completely twisting the logic!!'"
"'You just don't understand, Keiichi-kun!!'"

"'I may be a photographer, but sometimes I think of myself as a chef behind the viewfinder! When supple, perfectly ripened rabbit appears before me, rolling up my sleeves is the bare minimum expected of anyone who calls themselves a craftsman!!'"
"'Right now, with you as my finest ingredient, I am crafting the supreme dish of my lifetime!!!'"
"'Gyaaahhhh! Somebody stop this depraved photographer!!! Voyeuristic photos are absolutely not okay!! I categorically oppose low-angle photography!!'"
"Dwahhhhhh!! No matter what anyone says, that was utterly heartless!! That's already well beyond the territory of a punishment game!!!"
"Ohh-ho-ho-ho! I did say this was all our imagination earlier, didn't I? None of this is causing you any real harm, Keiichi-san!"
"It is causing harm!! Those smug grins you keep shooting me — the eyes that feel like they're running all over me — it's ticklish!!"
"Eyes can't physically run over people, can they? Ku ku ku! Fantasy is just thought. Freedom of thought is the most firmly guaranteed right in postwar Japan~~!!"
"...But but~~☆ Whether it stays as just fantasy — who knows~~☆ I can't wait for the next club session~~~!!"
"Hau~~~!!! Keiichi-kun going squeak-squeak with his bottom. Hau~!! I'm taking him home with me~~!!!"
"Ohh-ho-ho!! My head is already filling up with magnificent trap concepts! No matter what it takes, I absolutely will make Keiichi-san perform these punishment games!"
"Sis, you absolutely have to invite me to your next club session. Let's bring the full combined might of the Sonozaki family to bear and win a total victory!"
"...If the Sonozaki sisters ever joined forces, there would be no greater calamity than that day."
"And we'll need to get Oishi involved too~! Rena's punishment game involved making someone eat yogurt, wasn't it?"
changeReason: Old says 'We'll have to get Ooishi involved too' vs new says 'we'll need to get Oishi involved too'; character name spelling difference (Ooishi vs Oishi) and old says 'make Rena eat yogurt' vs new says 'making someone eat yogurt'.

TextENGNew: "Ah, and also — it's boring that Satoshi-kun hasn't appeared at all. Since we're on the subject, if we could get Satoshi-kun and Kei-chan to take turns spoon-feeding each other yogurt... pfft!! Almost got a nosebleed..."
"'D-Damn it, I'll make you all pay for this!!!!!'"
"'Mm... well... we can't help it, Keiichi. ...We did lose.'"
"'Damn it all!! That wasn't a game we should have lost! That careless blunder in the middle really cost us... If not for that, we could have turned it around!!!'"
"'Mm... ...S-Sorry.'"
"'...No, it... it's not only your fault, Satoshi. I share the blame for not catching the mistake in the moment. ...I went too far. I'm sorry.'"
"'We lost today. But we can win — the two of us together.'"
"'...Ah... Yeah, y-you're right! We just have to gracefully accept today's loss and give it everything next time...! Hahahaha...'"
"'Well then... let's just get this punishment game over with.'"
"'I'll go first. I just hold the spoon in my mouth, scoop up the yogurt, and feed it to you, right? ...Mmph... mmm~~~~~~~~~~'"
"'...What's wrong, Keiichi? If you don't eat soon, my jaw is going to give out...'"
"'...I just... well... two guys having to do something like this... it's... embarrassing...'"
"'Ahahahahaha. Keiichi. I think the whole point of a punishment is the embarrassment. So if we do it without getting embarrassed, we can probably get through it quickly.'"
"'...W-Well, I suppose. ...Acting embarrassed would only amuse them more... Right... ...But still, even so...'"
"'We just have to feed each other once each and it's done. Let's finish it up and call it over.'"
"'...I understand the logic... but... it's just... getting up the nerve is... ...embarrassing...'"
"'...I'm also... ...truthfully, doing something like this with you, Keiichi... it embarrasses me too.'"
"'Huh...? Oh... ...your hand...'"
"'...See? ...My heart has been pounding this whole time too. So... I want to get it over with quickly. Because if we don't, I'll...'"
"'Would you... ...not want to eat my yogurt...? ...If it were yours, Keiichi... ...I'd want to eat it... ...wouldn't you?'"
"Woahhhhhh, Satoshiiiii!! Ahh — and so the two of them take their first steps down the road to forbidden love!"
"Graahhhhh!!! Please stop dragging Nii-nii into your strange punishment games!!!"
"Grah?! Au au au...!"
``Whoa, Rika-chan, what is that? Some kind of secret potion?``
changeReason: Old translates 秘薬 (secret potion/medicine) as 'Chloroform' — a fabricated specific substance replacing the intentionally vague original.

TextENGNew: "...Mii~. It was just getting to the good part, and Satoko was being rather too loud."
"Rika-chan's mercilessness can be a little frightening sometimes. ...Ahahahahaha..."
"Hau?! Keiichi-kun has disappeared somewhere?! Someone other than Rena took him home!!! That's so unfair, so unfair, so UNFAIR!!!"
